Video.summary: You could still buy a Christmas tree in Los Angeles when this aired, at least according to guest Alan King.

Video.summary: Ricky Schroder juggles plastic eggs. Johnny tries, unaware Ricky swapped in real eggs. What a mess!

Video.summary: Carl makes his 46th visit to the couch. Discusses dieting, presents gifts: slippers, pipe, glasses and….a gun.
